subcodes.first_line: The Truth, glorified be His glory, hath enjoined upon all to gaze with their own eyes toward the horizon of Manifestation and to hearken with their own ears [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: حق جل جلاله کل را وصیت نموده که بچشم خود در افق ظهور نظر نمایند و بسمع خود
subcodes.subjects: @proofs of the Manifestations of God, @prayer for specific individuals; groups
